headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: A fair, practical comparison of Super and Apple’s new Siri AI. Siri shines as a deeply integrated, local‑first system assistant inside Apple’s ecosystem. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates computers — and gets faster and cheaper over time by reusing a computer-use cache.
